title: Order in Chaos
story: 第三关像收束。你开始明白，谜题不是为了难住你，而是为了把你带到最后那个很轻的动作前面。

pre_story.speaker: Unknown
pre_story.text: One more level. After this, the room stops asking for proof and starts asking for care.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: Sort brings order. But order is not always the goal. Wait for later levels.
